items.title: Hartford Balanced Income Fund Q2 2025 Commentary
items.description: Global fixed-income markets posted positive total returns in Q2 2025, as measured by the Bloomberg Global Aggregate Index hedged to US dollars. Read more here.

items.title: Stryker: Strong Multi-Faceted Growth Continuing To Support The Shares
items.description: Stryker continues to outperform peers with strong revenue growth, margin expansion, and successful product innovation. Learn more on SYK stock here.

items.title: ISRG's International Push for Ion: Strategic Bet or Overstretch?
items.description: Intuitive Surgical expands Ion into Australia and Korea after 52% procedure growth, testing Asia-Pacific adoption despite budget headwinds.

items.title: Nilesh Shah joins Illumina as Head of Region, AMEA
items.description: Illumina Inc. (NASDAQ: ILMN), a global leader in DNA sequencing and array-based technologies, announced today the appointment of Nilesh Shah as Head of Region, AMEA, effective immediately.

items.title: Global Tissue Engineering and Regeneration Market Set to Surge at 12.8% CAGR Through 2030
items.author: Bcc Research
items.description: The global tissue engineering and regeneration market is projected to grow from $5.4 billion in 2025 to $9.8 billion by 2030, driven by rising demand for regenerative medicine, increased research, and venture capital funding.
